---
title: "Why Do We Tell Ourselves Scary Stories About AI?"
author: "Amanda Gefter"
date: "2026-04-10"
date-added: "2026-04-11"
categories: [AI, philosophy, psychology, culture]
status: to-read
url: "https://www.quantamagazine.org/why-do-we-tell-ourselves-scary-stories-about-ai-20260410/"
---

Our tales of AI developing the will to survive, commandeer resources, and manipulate people say more about us than they do about language models.

[Read the full article →](https://www.quantamagazine.org/why-do-we-tell-ourselves-scary-stories-about-ai-20260410/)
